problem_statement: The selected read-only worker path now has a runtime receipt handoff, but the next evidence item named by that handoff lacks a schema-backed dry-run receipt that proves the future emitter envelope and keeps dispatch blocked.
success_criteria: ReadOnlyWorkerRuntimeReceiptEmitterDryRun validates against a public JSON schema and Foundation Mode example
the dry-run binds the handoff, binding, lease preflight, rehearsal receipt, and console projection evidence
runtime receipt emitter registration remains denied
runtime receipt schema binding remains denied
runtime receipt emission remains simulated only
future dispatch admission remains blocked until runner registration, runtime emitter registration, active temporal lease, UAO admission, and Phi_gov authorization exist
focused tests reject authority drift, source-ref drift, result drift, admission drift, receipt-ref drift, count drift, and terminal-closure drift
non_goals: no launch, production, customer, or support readiness claim
constraints: runtime receipt emitter registration remains denied
runtime receipt schema binding remains denied
future runtime admission must still require temporal lease evidence, UAO, Phi_gov, recovery evidence, and verification
WorkerFailureReceipt remains mandatory for failed or partial dispatch evidence
Mfidel atomicity remains preserved and no text-processing decomposition is introduced
evidence_required: runtime receipt emitter dry-run validator receipt
focused pytest receipt for dry-run behavior
workspace governance preflight receipt before closure claim
